column8: orig DXD3D::EndScene+AdvanceTexturePageUsageAges; port td5_render_end_scene routes through td5_plat_render_end_scene + td5_render_advance_texture_ages (LRU sweep). Same ordering, D3D11-abstracted.

orig sets FPU PC=64 via _controlfp(0x100,0x300), malloc(0x38) aligned transform, BuildSinCosLookupTables. Port folds into td5_render_init (transform reset + color LUT); FPU PC=64 set in main.c:405 per FPU_PC64_FWRAPV tag.

orig one-shot gate calling 3 init subroutines (TranslucentPipeline+ProjectedBuckets+WorkBuffer) + sentinel + clear-screen flag. Port td5_render_init merges them inline; sentinel collapsed to s_globals_initialized. Behaviour-equivalent.

orig DXD3DTexture::ClearAll + write 0 to d3d_exref+0xa34 under DAT_0048dba0 gate. Port td5_render_shutdown routes through td5_render_reset_texture_cache, clears fog, resets s_state_active/s_globals_initialized.

orig D3D3 driver-caps query (returns 2 if d3d_exref+0xa5c==0 else 0; 16- vs 24-bit page mode). D3D11 backend exposes uniform RGBA8 page formats; query folded away at every call site (td5_asset.c:3038 audit comment).
